title: astragalus floccosus subsp. floccosus
intro: Astragalus floccosus subsp. floccosus, also known as the Downy Milk Vetch, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of North America. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Astragalus floccosus subsp. floccosus include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Astragalus floccosus subsp. floccosus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
